no_external_taxonomies.description: Block any import of foreign ontologies or predefined category trees

logos_analog_priority.description: Prioritize analogical/emotional keyword clumps over purely analytical ones

strict_duality.description: Maintain left/right separation in processing — synthesis only at the merge point

no_digital_reduction_of_analog.description: Never reduce felt meaning to purely computational terms

synthesis_without_antithesis.description: Right side supports the left — never opposes it. Output is always analogical.
